whenToUse.summary: A video makes the primary sale on a landing page. The Add-to-Cart button can be hidden until after the price reveal to force watch-through. Includes an order form with a bump and a post-purchase OTO/downsell sequence. Use when video out-converts written copy for the audience/offer, or when the story is best carried on camera.
goals: Sell a product where a single sales video does the convincing
Force watch-through with a timed/hidden CTA reveal
Maximize AOV with bump + OTO after the video sale
Run a high-converting front or mid-ladder buyer offer
signals: Client has (or wants) a sales VIDEO as the primary pitch
Audience responds to video over long written copy
Offer benefits from a delayed/timed CTA reveal
antiSignals: Audience won't sit through video / prefers to read -> route to Sales Letter Funnel
Offer is a free/just-shipping front end -> 2-Step Tripwire (a 5-min VSL can still be the page video)
Offer is a live/registered event -> Webinar Funnel (event group)
Recurring subscription is the core -> Membership/Continuity

pageStructure.purpose: The autoplay Video Sales Letter makes the sale; the CTA/order button reveals on a timer (after the price reveal) to force watch-through, then the order form with bump converts.
keyElements: Curiosity headline above the player (minimal distraction)
Autoplay VSL embed (Perfect Webinar / Star-Story-Solution script)
Timed CTA button reveal (hidden until price reveal in the video)
Order form with ORDER BUMP appearing with/after the CTA
Guarantee, testimonials, FAQ below the fold for skimmers
widgets: Video embed (Vercel-built VSL page pulled in via embed link recommended for timed-reveal JS)
Skill 44: Order Form with Order Bump element
Custom HTML/JS in code block for the timed CTA reveal logic

pageStructure.purpose: Raise average order value with a one-click upsell (next-tier product, bundle, or done-for-you) immediately after the video sale.
Recover OTO decliners with a lower-priced or payment-plan version of the upsell.
Confirm purchase, deliver access, bond with the buyer, and bridge to the next offer.
keyElements: Next-step CTA into the value ladder
widgets: Optional Skill 44: Calendar widget if backend is a call

primaryPersona.script: VSL script formula + headline + benefit-stacking + objection-preemption; bump/OTO copy
primaryPersona.role: Writes the VSL script and the page copy (Copywriting Secrets has a dedicated VSL chapter)

videoScript.script: 5-Minute Perfect Webinar (under $100) or full Perfect Webinar (higher ticket), with an Epiphany Bridge story
videoScript.why: The Perfect Webinar (intro + story + one or three secrets + stack/close) is the proven structure for a sales video; the 5-minute version fits low-ticket VSLs.

supportingPersonas.script: VSL recipe — hidden/timed CTA reveal, order-form + bump + OTO placement
supportingPersonas.role: Governs the page structure and the CTA-reveal mechanic
Shapes the on-camera story and the bonding voice

copyFramework.notes: Copywriting Secrets writes the script and page copy; the video follows a Perfect Webinar / Epiphany Bridge structure; the Cookbook governs the timed-reveal page mechanic. The CTA is hidden until the price reveal in the video.

skill6Steps: Create Funnel -> name with client prefix -> Create
Add New Step 1 = 'VSL Sales Page' (build in Vercel for the timed-reveal JS, pull in via embed link)
skill44Widgets: Order Form + Order Bump on Step 1
ghlBuild.notes: The timed CTA reveal needs custom JS, so build the VSL page in Vercel and pull into the GHL step via embed link (the code-block element alone may not render the timed-reveal cleanly). Pre-build the order form, tags, and products via Skill 44 (or GHL MCP/API) and embed them. Host the video on Vimeo/Wistia/YouTube and embed.
